name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable mesh chair with lumbar support, armrests, and breathable back panel for all-day comfort.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact TKL mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches, RGB backlighting, and USB-C connectivity.

name: Standing Desk
description: Electric height-adjustable standing desk with memory presets, cable management tray, and solid bamboo top.

name: 4K Webcam
description: Ultra-HD webcam with built-in stereo microphone, auto-focus, and low-light correction for video calls.

name: USB-C Docking Station
description: 12-in-1 docking station with dual 4K HDMI, Gigabit Ethernet, 100W PD charging, and USB-A/C ports.

name: LED Desk Lamp
description: Touch-control LED lamp with 5 colour temperatures, 10 brightness levels, USB charging port, and memory function.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: 15W Qi-certified fast wireless charger compatible with iPhone, Samsung, and AirPods with anti-slip surface.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° surround sound Bluetooth 5.3 speaker, IPX7 waterproof, 20-hour playback, USB-C rechargeable.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: 24/7 heart rate and SpO2 monitor, sleep tracking, GPS, 7-day battery, and 50m water resistance.

name: Noise-Isolating Earbuds
description: In-ear wired earbuds with silicone ear tips, inline remote, and high-fidelity drivers for immersive listening.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: USB-powered screen bar with asymmetric optical design to reduce glare, touch dimmer, and colour temperature control.

name: Laptop Stand
description: Adjustable aluminium laptop stand with 6 height levels, anti-slip pads, and foldable design for portability.

name: Mesh Wi-Fi System (3-Pack)
description: Tri-band mesh Wi-Fi 6 system covering up to 5,400 sq ft with parental controls and automatic updates.

name: Air Purifier
description: 3-stage HEPA filtration covering 500 sq ft, real-time air quality display, whisper-quiet sleep mode.
